channel.title: Privacy on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Privacy on Systology

item.title: Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning Platform
item.description: Platform design for federated learning that trains across devices without sharing raw data, with secure aggregation and privacy safeguards.

item.title: Search & Retrieval Engine
item.description: Design a high-performance search and retrieval engine for large document/media collections with low-latency ranking and scalable indexing.

item.title: AI/ML Workshop
item.description: A carefully curated set of practical, highly reproducible machine learning examples (PyTorch, Hugging Face, NumPy) featuring MPS-aware benchmarks and rigorous experiment hygiene for local hardware.

item.title: Mailprune
item.description: A highly effective, local-first email auditing and automated cleanup tool designed to definitively identify noisy senders and deliver actionable, strictly privacy-preserving recommendations.

item.title: Privacy & Agents
item.description: Privacy-first design rules for autonomous AI agents; establishing local-first execution defaults, strict data minimization and redaction, explicit user consent flows, and transparent, auditable action logs.

item.title: Ragchain
item.description: A comprehensive local RAG stack (ChromaDB + Ollama) designed for strictly private, reproducible retrieval and LLM inference; heavily focusing on hybrid retrieval strategies and index versioning.
